title: BeautifulTNTs
description: Improves the visual quality of exploding TNTs, like in the trailers!
body:
A super lightweight graphical improvement mod that makes the TNT blink like it was originally intended.

![Visual comparison between BeautifulTNTs visuals and Vanilla visuals](https://github.com/FalsePattern/BeautifulTNTs/blob/master/beautifultnts.gif?raw=true)
